findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 28. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Repeated page header/footer content in HTML
findings.evidence: The following text blocks repeat 3+ times, likely page headers/footers that should not appear in the body: 'process components evaluation criteria' (5x).

findings.description: Gear cycle diagram and concentric circles diagram missing from HTML; only text labels remain
findings.evidence: PDF shows a gear-shaped cycle diagram illustrating Basin Model / Basin Plan / Water Resources Management relationships and a concentric circles diagram showing Water Resources Management > Integrated Basin Plan > Hydrologic Model. HTML renders these as plain text labels ('Basin Model', 'Basin Plan', 'Water Resources Management', 'Integrated Basin Plan', 'HYDROLOGIC MODEL') without the visual diagrams.

findings.description: Hierarchical organizational chart for Process Components missing; rendered as text list only
findings.evidence: PDF shows a color-coded hierarchical chart with boxes and connecting lines depicting Hydrologic Model branching to Historical Flows, Operation Guidelines, Water Use (with sub-branches), and Evaluation Criteria. HTML renders this as a nested bullet list without the visual chart.

findings.description: Venn diagram for Project Organization missing from HTML
findings.evidence: PDF shows three overlapping circles (Venn diagram) depicting organizational relationships: Data Coordination (HDR), Model Development/Data Process (HydroLogics Team, Hazen and Sawyer), and Data, Model Evaluation & Plan Development (NCDWR). HTML renders this as a simple bullet list, losing the visual depiction of organizational overlap.

findings.description: Missing bar chart image for 'Stream Condition Middle Deep River (Node 280)' flow regime changes (PDF page 17). The substantive grouped bar chart showing % of Days at Flow Level across demand scenarios is absent from the HTML. Only the legend items and axis labels are rendered as text.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 17 contains a grouped bar chart with bars for QAA flow-level categories across Unimpaired, 2003, 2030, and 2050 Demands. The HTML section for this content has no tag; it only lists the legend items as
  • elements.

findings.description: Missing Venn diagram image for 'Project Organization' (PDF page 21). The PDF shows three overlapping circles representing Data Coordination (HDR), Model Development/Data Process (HydroLogics Team, Hazen and Sawyer), and Data/Model Evaluation & Plan Development (NCDWR). The HTML renders this as a bulleted list with no tag.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 21 has a Venn diagram with three overlapping circles. The HTML section for Project Organization contains only: '
  • Data Coordination: HDR
  • Model Development/Data Process: HydroLogics Team, Hazen and Sawyer
  • Data, Model Evaluation & Plan Development: NCDWR
' with no corresponding .

findings.description: Missing conceptual framework diagrams from PDF page 3. The PDF shows two substantive diagrams: (1) three interlocking gears labeled 'Basin Plan', 'Basin Model', 'Water Resources Management' and (2) concentric circles with 'HYDROLOGIC MODEL' inside 'Integrated Basin Plan' inside 'Water Resources Management'. These visual relationships are lost; only the text labels remain.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 3 has gear and concentric-circle diagrams showing the conceptual framework. The HTML renders them as plain paragraphs: '

Basin Model

Basin Plan

Water Resources Management

Integrated Basin Plan

HYDROLOGIC MODEL

' with no tags.
